# GitHub

gh / GitHub API client and its data types (Issue, PullRequest, GitHubClient).

**Tier:** Foundation

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos_loom.github_client` | M | 9 | 4 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.github_client`
- class `GitHubRef` тАФ A parsed reference to a GitHub issue or pull request.
- def `parse_github_ref` тАФ Parse a canonical ``https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/(issues|pull)/<n>`` URL.
- class `GitHubError` тАФ Base for GitHub-watcher errors. Subclasses carry actionable context.
- class `GitHubAuthError` тАФ Raised when GitHub auth fails (401, 403, or missing/broken gh CLI).
- class `GitHubRepoNotFoundError` тАФ Raised when a watched repo returns 404.
- class `GitHubIssueNotFoundError` тАФ Raised when an issue-level endpoint returns 404 (the issue is gone).
- class `GitHubRateLimitError` тАФ Raised when a rate-limit retry exhausts (currently only on a second 403).
- class `Issue` тАФ The slice of GitHub's issue payload the watcher cares about.
- class `PullRequest` тАФ The slice of GitHub's pull-request payload the PR-merge watcher cares about.
- def `parse_marker` тАФ Extract the task id from a ``<!-- lithos:<id> -->`` marker, if present.
- def `apply_marker` тАФ Return ``body`` with a canonical marker appended at the end.
- def `strip_marker` тАФ Return ``body`` with any ``<!-- lithos:<id> -->`` marker removed.
- class `GitHubClient` тАФ Async client for the slice-7.1 subset of the GitHub REST API.
